name: Adorned Drakling Daggers
description: Only Draklings skilled enough earn the right to wield these adorned daggers. They often remain a trusted weapon for a lifetime.
location: Veilwater Basin - Drakling Nest elite enemies

name: Baroness Daggers
description: An elegant dual dagger set with extravagant gold detailing. Slim enough to be smuggled underneath a nightgown unseen into any chamber.
location: Revelwood - Silver/Gold chests in Pike Capital City

name: Blink Daggers
description: Striking in the blink of an eye, these daggers can slash any throat quickly.
location: Revelwood - Gold chests in Fawnsong Frontier

name: Blunt Knives
description: A dull set of daggers. Simple, but still efficient in a pinch.
location: Springlands - Scavenger enemies / Low Meadows silver chests

name: Broodmother's Eye
description: These daggers are adorned with crystal inlays shaped like eyes, a constant reminder that the Broodmother Vesztah watches them at all times.
location: Veilwater Basin - Broodmother Vesztah boss drop

name: Circus Knives
description: A pair of circus knives that can do a lot of damage if left in untrained hands! Better watch out!
location: Nomad Highlands - Scavenger Carnival POI chests

name: Corrosive Daggers
description: These blades were corroded by being submerged in poison for too long.
location: Springlands - Fell Banshee drop in Shroud areas

name: Crystal Knives
description: A crystalline frame lines the edges of these short blades. They shift incoming light and reflect it, bathing the daggers in the color of fresh mountain springs.
location: Albaneve Summits - Crystal cave chests near Ice Spire

name: Daggers
description: A common daggers suitable for level 1 players.
location: Starter craft - 2 Wood + 1 Stone at campfire

name: Drakling Daggers
description: These daggers mark the next stage for young Drak after training with bamboo sticks. Their compact size makes them easy to wield even from an early age.
location: Veilwater Basin - Young Drak enemies near shoreline

name: Falk Fall Daggers
description: The edge of these daggers is shaped like the break of a soaring eagle, willing to strike down toward its enemies.
location: Nomad Highlands - Falk Fall eagle nest POI

name: Grey Blades
description: A pair of dark, grey daggers adorned with a bright green gem the color of envy.
location: Revelwood - Shroud-covered ruins in eastern forest

name: Half-Light Halos
description: Step only where you remain unseen, strike those whose eyes are blinded by your glint in the half-light.
location: Shroud Lair - Loot from Shroud-covered ruins in Springlands

name: Horn Daggers
description: The many layers of smelted metal in these daggers make them appear similar to an animal's tiered horn, tapering off at the edges.
location: Albaneve Summits - Minotaur Hornbreaker boss drop

name: Ice-Coated Daggers
description: The tip of these daggers has become permanently frosted after piercing the ice-cold heart of a Cyclops.
location: Albaneve Summits - Cyclops drop in ice caverns

name: Lightforged Daggers
description: Daggers that were bathed in sunlight during forging. Their spiked edge can cause a lot of damage.
location: Kindlewastes - Sun Forge crafting station (requires Sunstone)

name: Makeshift Daggers
description: A long pair of daggers with cloth around the handle.
location: Starter craft - 3 Wood + 2 Cloth at campfire

name: Nightfall
description: A dagger set made from darkened steel, reflecting the moonlight on its fractured edges.
location: Shroud Lair - Nightstalker boss drop

name: Nightnebula
description: A mystical pair of blades used for unspeakable divinations held under the full moon.
location: Hollow Halls - Chest in Hall of Whispers (endgame dungeon)

name: Oath Breaker
description: There are only a few ways to flee a promise you don't intend to keep. At least one of them involves murder.
location: Nomad Highlands - Oathbreaker Knight elite drop

name: Parade Daggers
description: These spiky daggers were often worn by soldiers around their belts during parades as a show of force.
location: Springlands - Abandoned military camp chests

name: Proud Daggers
description: Daggers with many edges and sharp hooks. They can be whipped out in the blink of an eye to parry incoming attacks, thus defending your honor.
location: Revelwood - Pike Noble enemies in capital city

name: Sacrificial Vukah Dagger
description: A crude dagger, previously used by a Vukah in a bloody ritual.
location: Nomad Highlands - Vukah Sacrifice Hill boss drop

name: Sandstorm Swiftblades
description: A dagger set of old-timey Eastern craftsmanship. Rogues would swing this short cutlass around during battle, causing nearby sand to swirl up and blind the enemy.
location: Kindlewastes - Sun Temple chests in eastern desert

name: Shellbreaker Daggers
description: Sometimes a Drak hatchling proves too weak to break its shell. The Broodwardens use this poison-tipped blade to cut the egg open.
location: Veilwater Basin - Broodwarden elite enemies at Drak nests

name: Shivering Skeans
description: A frosty set of daggers said to be infused with the souls of those who died in the coldest winters.
location: Albaneve Summits - Ice cave chests near frozen lake

name: Shivs
description: A dagger set that was scavenged from the ruins of the old world. Dirty and dusty, but still does the trick.
location: Springlands - Scavenger melee enemies / starter chests

name: Sleek Daggers
description: These daggers are sleek and swift. The blade is sharp as ever.
location: Springlands - Silver chests in Towers

name: The Needles
description: A fine pair of twin daggers meant to pierce arteries with precision and grace.
location: Nomad Highlands - Gold chest in Umber Hollow

name: Valor Heart Daggers
description: A dagger that can easily be hidden underneath lavish sleeves or dressy skirts. Quick and easy to unsheathe in times of need!
location: Blacksmith craft - Requires Iron Bars + Leather (Lore Weapon)

name: Venomkiss
description: A deviously poisoned set of daggers that meander like the slithering body of a Kindlewastes Diamondback snake.
location: Kindlewastes - Diamondback Snake elite drop in southern desert

name: Wildheart Seekers
description: A naturalistic dagger set with wooden handles. The blades are slightly curved and are ideal for skinning animals.
location: Nomad Highlands - Wildlife boss drops / Lupa's Lair chests

name: Wolf Daggers
description: This dagger pair is adorned with a wolf head detail, representing its ferocious strike.
location: Revelwood - Wolf pack enemies in Glennswood

name: Acid Cleaver
description: A rare weapon that deals cutting/poison damage.
location: Springlands - Scavenger Acidman elite drop

name: Apex Machete
description: A legendary weapon that deals cutting/piercing damage.
location: Veilwater Basin - Apex Predator boss in flooded ruins
